name: bench-wiki
description: Read and write BenchAGI canon entries via the /api/v1/wiki endpoints. All calls carry the user's Bench UID for scoping + billing.

tools.name: wiki_canon_read
tools.description: Read approved canon entries. Filters: kind (canon|synthesis|dream|consolidation|protocol|sop), agent, rarity, instanceId. Returns entries with their rarity and approval status.

tools.name: wiki_ingest
tools.description: Bulk-ingest one or more canon/synthesis/dream entries from a local vault into the caller's per-user shard at users/{uid}/wikiEntries/{slug}. Cowork-auth (Bench JWT) — not the super-admin OpenClaw ingest path. Body is a wrapped array: { entries: [Entry, ...] } — even for a single entry. Minimum entry is { slug, title, markdown }; localHash and localMtime auto-fill server-side from sha256(markdown) and server clock. Server derives kind/agent/rarity from the slug and stamps approvalStatus='draft', submittedVia='cowork-ingest', authorUid/authorEmail from auth. Dedup by localHash within the user shard. All entries land as drafts; reviewer promotes to platform canon explicitly. Server caps: 500 entries per request, 512 KB markdown per entry.

_entry_shape.slug: string (required; kebab-case; matches /^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9\-_.]*$/i; no '/'; max 256 chars)
_entry_shape.title: string (required)
_entry_shape.markdown: string (required; was called 'body' in 0.2.0 — renamed to 'markdown'; max 512 KB utf-8)
_entry_shape.localHash: string (optional in 0.3.0+; server fills with sha256(markdown) if omitted; dedup key)
_entry_shape.localMtime: string (optional in 0.3.0+; ISO 8601 UTC; server fills with now() if omitted)
_entry_shape.kind: canon | synthesis | dream | consolidation | protocol | sop (optional hint; server derives from slug)
_entry_shape.agent: string (optional hint; server derives from slug)
_entry_shape.rarity: common | uncommon | rare | epic | legendary (optional hint; server sets rarityRequired by kind-default)

response_schema.parseErrors: Array<{ index, error }> (optional; present only when any entries failed validation)

tools.name: wiki_search
tools.description: Case-insensitive substring search across approved canon. Matches against title + markdown body; returns the same shape as wiki_canon_read with an added `score` (number of matches). Rank-gated to the caller's viewer rank.

tools.name: wiki_draft
tools.description: Draft a single canon entry from a conversation or session. Member-auth (Cowork JWT); writes to wikiEntries/{slug} with approvalStatus='draft' for admin review — never auto-approves. Payload is flat (NOT wrapped in an `entries` array like wiki_ingest). Author attribution comes from the auth context; authorUid/authorEmail in the payload are ignored. Tenant is drawn from auth.instanceId server-side; sending `instanceId` in the payload returns 400. Use this tool from the wiki-capture skill for user-driven captures; wiki_ingest is only for the super-admin OpenClaw daemon.

body_schema.title: string (required; 1..256 chars)
body_schema.kind: canon | synthesis | dream (required; strict subset — no consolidation/protocol/sop at draft tier)
body_schema.agent: aurelius | bailey | sage | cole | ember | piper | kestrel-coder | aerie (required)
body_schema.rarity: common | uncommon | rare | epic | legendary (required; reviewer can override at promotion)

response_schema.reviewUrl: string (relative path to the admin review queue with the slug pre-filled)
